name: World Cup Pack
description:
Pokémon Trainers, take the pitch.

Introducing the World Cup Pack – a special themed release inspired by football energy, stadium moments, and the crossover charm that makes collectibles feel unforgettable.

Each pack is sealed with blockchain-level fairness.
Every card inside is encrypted, its authenticity anchored by Merkle proofs and zero-knowledge validation – ensuring that what you draw is truly random, transparent, and verifiable on-chain.

A themed limited release.
1,000 real graded cards, fairly encrypted.
Vault-secured custody.
Live, verifiable, on-chain.

Kick off the moment.
Reveal the card.
author: Renaiss

name: Eden Pack
description:
Collectors, enter Eden.

Introducing the Eden Pack – a new Infinite Gacha release inspired by rare treasures, legendary pulls, and the thrill of finding paradise at sea.

Each draw is sealed with blockchain-level fairness.
Every card inside is encrypted, its authenticity anchored by Merkle proofs and zero-knowledge validation – ensuring that what you draw is truly random, transparent, and verifiable on-chain.

An Infinite Gacha release.
With BGS Black Label 10 cards entering the pool.
Vault-secured custody.
Live, verifiable, on-chain.

Enter Eden.
Reveal the treasure.
author: Renaiss x Logoman

name: OMEGA
description:
Pokémon Trainers, welcome to the infinite era.
This is Renaiss’ perpetual gacha - an always-on card machine with a continuously refreshed pool.
Each pack is sealed with blockchain-level fairness.
Every card inside is encrypted, its authenticity anchored by Merkle proofs and zero-knowledge validation - ensuring that what you draw is truly random, transparent, and verifiable on-chain.
Cards flow in and out dynamically under an infinite supply model, with pricing and expected value aligned to real market conditions.
Real graded cards.
Live, verifiable, on-chain.
author: Renaiss

name: RenaCrypt Pack
description:
Collectors, welcome to Renacrypt.

Introducing the Renacrypt Pack — an always-on collaborative card engine by Renaiss × Collector Crypt.

This is not a limited drop.
This is a perpetual system.

An infinite card machine powered by a continuously refreshed vault-backed pool — where real graded collectibles circulate dynamically in and out under live market alignment.
Each pack is sealed with blockchain-level fairness.

Every card is encrypted, with its provenance anchored by Merkle proofs and zero-knowledge validation — ensuring that every pull is provably random, fully transparent, and verifiable on-chain.

No artificial scarcity.
No hidden mechanics.

Supply flows.
Market aligns.
Fairness remains absolute.

Real graded cards.
Vault-secured custody.
Live, verifiable, on-chain.

Renacrypt is where the machine never sleeps.

Pull anytime.
author: Renaiss x CC
